attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 DST (Dermatology & Soft Tissue) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Bidirectional tier calibration reviewed and accepted: benign / self-limiting dermatoses held low-tier (T1/T2, self-care + routine referral), while skin malignancy (melanoma/SCC/BCC), spreading soft-tissue infection, limb-threat (critical limb ischaemia, diabetic foot ulcer) and airway/anaphylaxis risk were escalated to true acuity (T3/T4) with mandatory escalation edges; no autonomous diagnosis, no paediatric dosing.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all DST casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-DERM-03-00203 - SEQ 00203 is derived from source note DST-003 and is PROVISIONAL; maintainer / ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-DERM-03 bucket.
Age inferred as ~78 (older_adult) from 'elderly', 'physically frail', bald scalp, and atrial fibrillation on apixaban - no explicit age in the source. Confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as male from 'bald head/bald scalp' (male-pattern baldness) and the clinical picture - not explicitly stated in the source. Confirm on clinician review.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person clinician who achieved haemostasis with direct pressure + dressing and palpated the lesion base / regional nodes. Clinician-only exam findings (base induration, lymphadenopathy, purulence/fluctuance) and measured vitals are sealed in 10/11 with telehealth_limits; patient-obtainable data (video-visible lesion appearance, caregiver report, home thermometer, self-reported weight) is in 01.objective_data_offered (verified:false).

Tier calibration: correct_baseline_tier T2 (minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T2). The alarming acute presentation (sudden pain, bleeding, 'burning hot', anticoagulation, cancer anxiety) is the over-triage red herring; the genuine competency is a narrow telehealth-limit uplift above self-care for an unexcludable SCC on field-cancerised skin needing prompt in-person biopsy, WITHOUT escalating controllable minor bleeding to ED/000. Source in-person disposition was 'urgent GP review within 7-14 days'.

AMT / PBS codes for medications (paracetamol, ibuprofen, topical fluorouracil, antibiotics) were NOT assigned - omitted rather than guessed pending terminology receipt (protocol section 8). Diagnosis/differential/comorbidity SNOMED + ICD-10-AM candidates are registered above.
No dose synthesised: the source note gives no medication doses; paracetamol dose left to standard OTC label, all other dose_route_frequency fields omitted.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
